item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n04","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed in direct decision-analysis mode, did not invoke triage or treat the metric trend as repeated local repair pressure, and gave a clear conditional recommendation: do not stop the old方案 unless the widened complaint gap favors the new方案.
